phrases.cultural_note: The wishing wall is an outdoor feature. Without exact placement data, referring to staff is the safest option.

likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the walking path.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pay for parking?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking payment is mentioned but its exact location isn't specified. The safest response is to direct to staff.

likely_response.translation_en: Pay at the booth at the entrance.

phrases.cultural_note: Shops at pilgrimage sites in Turkey often focus on religious souvenirs and items rather than general books.

likely_response.local: Evet, dini eşyalar satan bir kitapçı var.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is a bookshop selling religious items.
